name: trips
description: Per-trip ecosystem under beacon/trips/<slug>/. Each trip is a flat folder with an atlas note + 5 baseline sections (Flights, Stay, Packing List, To Do, Notes). Hub at beacon/trips/Trips.md lists trips as BeaconCards row-layout cards sorted upcoming-first. 'New Trip' button scaffolds the directory tree from a name + dates + location dialog. Per-trip nav buttons auto-discover sibling sections.

post_install.message: Trips blueprint v0.1.0 installed at beacon/trips/. Open beacon/trips/Trips.md and click 'New Trip' to scaffold your first trip. Each trip lives at beacon/trips/<slug>/ with an atlas + 5 section notes; per-trip nav buttons auto-discover sibling sections so user-added files get nav coverage automatically. Cmd+R required after this install to load TripsHubCards + TripNavButtons CustomJS classes.
